name: po-adk-typescript
description: MediCore — Multi-Agent Healthcare Orchestration Platform · Google ADK · A2A Protocol · TypeScript

scripts.dev: concurrently -c "blue,green,yellow" -n "diagnosis,intake,orchestrator" "npx tsx diagnosis_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx intake_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx orchestrator/server.ts"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -c "blue,green,yellow,cyan,magenta,red,white,bold" -n "diagnosis,intake,orchestrator,navigator,treatment,billing,followup,social" "npx tsx diagnosis_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx intake_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx orchestrator/server.ts" "npx tsx care_navigator_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx treatment_planner_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx insurance_billing_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx followup_adherence_agent/server.ts" "npx tsx social_barrier_agent/server.ts"
scripts.adk:web: npm run build && npx adk web dist
scripts.adk:run: npm run build && npx adk run dist
